function.message: Completed the next inbox request by OCR-structuring all Badger-related bill records in `50_finance/purchases/` with bill-schema YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed inbox workflow (lowest filename, complete then delete), OCR/migration workflow (add YAML frontmatter in place), and finance schema (required bill fields + line items). Preserved original note bodies verbatim below frontmatter.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task requested: 'OCR all bills related to Badger' (`00_inbox/000_next-task.md`). A finance search found four Badger-related bill files, each was read and updated with schema-compliant bill frontmatter extracted from visible record tables/line items, and the inbox item was deleted after full completion per workflow.
